meaning: n.沃登(日耳曼神话中的主神,相当于北欧神话中的Odin)
examples: Wednesday derives from the ancient Norse king of the gods, Woden, and Thursday was originally Thor's day, in honour of Thor, the god of thunder.
The Old German god Woden gave his name to this day.
Woden, who was the father of Tyr, was the god of storms.
